summary: M448 — Mobile bottom panel no longer expands on a hero's turn. The spell rail was the only visible child of the active-actor card after M444's chrome strip; it lived in the .ev-hud's normal layout flow with bg+border+padding, adding ~48px when a hero turn fired. Combined with M447's live-hud-height groundY measurement, this shoved every sprite upward each turn. Fix: position:absolute the rail at bottom:100% of .ev-hud so it overlays the bottom of the canvas with a thin gutter without occupying any in-flow height. Active card itself now has height:0 so it stops reserving padding space. Portrait strip stays untouched.
